title: turnera subnuda
intro: Turnera subnuda, also known as the Panama flower or yellow ginseng, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Turnera subnuda is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, stress, and insomnia. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Turnera subnuda, such as tea and capsules, can be obtained through drying and processing the plant's leaves, roots, and flowers.
